description_long: This apartment building features a rectangular, two-story structure with a flat, overhanging roof in a dark gray color. The facade is clad in light gray siding, punctuated by evenly spaced rectangular windows with white frames, providing a sense of symmetry and order. The main entrance is centrally located on the front side, accessed by a small set of steps and flanked by low, manicured green hedges. A single palm tree stands to the left of the entrance, adding a touch of landscaping and urban greenery. The building's sides and rear continue the window pattern, with no visible balconies or additional entrances. The overall design is clean and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern, two-story apartment building with a flat gray roof, light gray siding, symmetrical windows, and a central entrance framed by hedges and a palm tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, hedges, and a palm tree to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, flat roof, and two windows on the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long wall with multiple evenly spaced windows and no visible entrance or landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear view of the flat roof, blank wall, and the palm tree positioned at the rear.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows on each floor, evenly spaced and aligned vertically and horizontally across all visible facades.
